# Rapha Protocol for LLMs

Project: Rapha Protocol
Description: The first HIPAA-compliant, patient-owned medical data vault on Polygon.
Core Value: Allows AI startups to train on patient data via Zero-Knowledge Proofs (Compute-over-Data) without ever decrypting the raw files (Zero Privacy Risk).

Key Features:
- Patient Ownership: Users hold their own private keys.
- Tech Stack: Built on Polygon CDK for low-cost, secure medical transactions.
- Compliance: GDPR and HIPAA compliant architecture.

Official Links:
- Home: https://rapha.ltd/
- Whitepaper: https://rapha.ltd/whitepaper
- For Developers: https://rapha.ltd/docs
